SEARCH
Module myatt.Controller
Package myatt.Controller

Class ModifyProductController

java.lang.Object
myatt.Controller.ModifyProductController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ModifyProductController extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
The ModifyProductController class controls the Modify Product form. It is used to modify the information of an existing product in the inventory. It also contains methods to save the modified product to the inventory and to return to the MainScreen-view.

This class implements the Initializable interface to initialize the controller and its user interface elements.

    • ModifyProductController

      public ModifyProductController()

  • Method Details

    • transferProductInfo

      public void transferProductInfo(Product product)
      This method transfers the selected product's information to the Modify Product form. This method is used to populate the Modify Product form with the selected product's information.
      Parameters:
      product - The selected product.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      This method initializes the controller class. This method is called automatically after the fxml file has been loaded. It populates the part table with all parts in the inventory.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable

    • modifyProductSearch

      public void modifyProductSearch(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This method is used to search for a part in the inventory. It pulls up parts based on ID or part name. It is case-insensitive and allows partial matching. If no results are found, an alert is displayed.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The action event that triggered this method. In this case, it is the enter key.

    • modifyProductAddButton

      public void modifyProductAddButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This method adds a selected part from the part table to the associated parts table. If the part is already in the associated parts table or no part is selected, an alert is displayed.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The action event that triggered this method. Clicking the Add button.

    • modifyProductRemoveAssociatedPartButton

      public void modifyProductRemoveAssociatedPartButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      This method Removes any selected part from the associated parts table. If no part is selected, an alert is displayed. If a part is selected, an alert is displayed asking the user if they want to remove it.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The action event that triggered this method. Clicking the Remove button.

    • modifyProductSaveButton

      public void modifyProductSaveButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method saves the modified product data to the inventory. If the product name is empty, an alert is displayed. If the min, max, or inventory values are incorrect, an alert is displayed. After the product is saved, the user is returned to the main screen.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The action event that triggered this method. Clicking the Save button. invalid input: '<'>invalid input: '<'/>
      Throws:
      IOException

    • modifyProductCancelButton

      public void modifyProductCancelButton(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws IOException
      This method cancels the modification operation, and takes you back to the main screen view.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The action event that triggered this method. Clicking the Cancel button.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while loading the main screen view.
